# Voqal AI

> Voqal AI is a UK-based AI Receptionist service providing 24/7 phone answering, appointment booking, and lead qualification for dental practices, law firms, and trades businesses. Plans start from £197/month with no contracts.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://voqalai.com/): Overview of AI receptionist services
- [Pricing](https://voqalai.com/pricing/): Transparent monthly pricing plans
- [How It Works](https://voqalai.com/how-it-works/): Step-by-step onboarding process
- [Industries](https://voqalai.com/industries/): Sector-specific use cases (dental, legal, trades)
- [FAQ](https://voqalai.com/faq/): Common questions about AI receptionists

## About

Voqal AI serves UK SMEs that cannot afford to miss inbound calls. The service uses voice AI agents and chat agents to handle calls, qualify leads, and book appointments automatically.

## Contact

https://voqalai.com/contact/
